files.notes: This file contains three distinct sections: 'Notes from the Field' (reports from various stakes and missions), 'Notes to the Field' (announcements and information for field workers), and the beginning of the Editorial section with 'Our Mother Tongue'. The file appears to end mid-editorial section based on the table of contents which shows additional editorial content should follow.
